name: Iron Skies
short_description: In this thrilling steampunk adventure from Dualbooted, take command of an airship as you fight to protect a series of floating islands from villainous forces.
detailed_description: In this thrilling steampunk adventure from Dualbooted, take command of an airship as you fight to protect a series of floating islands from villainous forces. Navigate through beautifully crafted skies, engage in intense airship battles, and seek the aid of docked ships on the islands for reinforcements. With a mix of strategic combat and exploration, each level challenges you to either outmaneuver your foes or form alliances to save the islands from destruction. Prepare for epic encounters in a world where air superiority is key to victory.
about_the_game: In this thrilling steampunk adventure from Dualbooted, take command of an airship as you fight to protect a series of floating islands from villainous forces. With a mix of strategic combat and exploration, each level challenges you to either outmaneuver your foes or form alliances to save the islands from destruction. Prepare for epic encounters in a world where air superiority is key to victory.
